title: Xi Jinping Just Landed in North Korea. First Time in 7 Years.
script: First visit! Chinese President Xi Jinping arrived in Pyongyang, North Korea, on June 8 for a rare state visit — his first in 7 years. Kim Jong Un and his wife Ri Sol Ju welcomed Xi at the airport with a 21-gun salute, a military band, and flowers from North Korean children. Xi called on both nations to deepen strategic cooperation and expand ties in trade, agriculture, and technology. The visit comes just weeks after Xi hosted both Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin in quick succession in Beijing. The 65th anniversary of the China-North Korea mutual defense treaty was a backdrop. China and North Korea have never been closer. Does the world know what exactly Xi and Kim agreed to in Pyongyang?
